<!-- PR titles are Conventional Commits (`type(area): summary`) — the title becomes the squash commit on main. -->

## What

<!-- One short paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Card

<!-- Board card id(s) this closes (e.g. T-009), or "n/a" for changes without a card. -->

## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer who doesn't know this code can follow to validate the change. Skip for pure plumbing. -->

## Acceptance

<!-- For card PRs: each `## Acceptance` bullet mapped to the check that proved it. -->

## Notes

<!-- Optional, but don't drop what review needs: deviations from the card's plan (and why),
     pre-existing issues found along the way, anything deliberately left out of scope.
     These headings are a floor, not a ceiling — add sections if they help. -->
